title: App Settings- General - Account - Invite to second tenant, UI
scenario: Cloud Admin Lens account invites appear and disappear correctly on login/logout in App Settings > General > Account section
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
3. Ensure the user's email has received two Lens account invites from a Cloud Admin.
4. Log in to the app using the invited email address.
5. Observe the Account section — verify that both Lens account invites are displayed.
6. Log out of the app from the Account section.
7. Verify that both invites disappear from the Account section after logout.
8. Log back into the app using the same email address.
9. Verify that both Lens account invites reappear in the Account section.
10. Accept one of the two Lens account invites.
11. Verify that the accepted invite disappears from the list, while the other (unaccepted) invite remains visible.
13. Verify that the tenant information displayed corresponds to the accepted Lens account.
14. Return to App Settings → General → Account.
15. Decline the remaining Lens account invite.
16. Navigate back to Support → App section.
17. Verify that the tenant information remains unchanged (still shows the previously accepted Lens account).
expected: The Account section correctly displays both invites when logged in, hides them when logged out, shows them again on re-login. Accepting one invite removes it while keeping the other. Tenant info in Support → App reflects the accepted account. Declining the remaining invite does not alter the tenant info.
